"C:/Users/ische/Desktop/blackbox_v2_bootloader/stm32f411ceux_flash.ld" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=blackbox_v2_bootloader.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--start-group -lc -lm -Wl,--end-group
